description: Synthetic checklist for cardiology referrals. Not a clinical guideline.

required_items.label: Recent symptom or encounter note
required_items.why_it_matters: The specialist needs a clear reason for referral and symptom context.

required_items.label: BNP, troponin, or relevant cardiac marker
required_items.why_it_matters: Relevant markers can support triage and review.

required_items.label: ECG summary
required_items.why_it_matters: ECG context is commonly needed for cardiology referrals.

required_items.label: Recent blood pressure context
required_items.why_it_matters: Blood pressure context helps frame cardiovascular risk.

required_items.label: Echocardiogram or relevant imaging result
required_items.why_it_matters: Relevant imaging supports triage and prevents repeat requests.
